headline: Ryder Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Increase Y/Y, 2026 EPS View Up

headline: Low-cost airline CEO warns of looming airline bankruptcies
summary: With the Strait of Hormuz still functionally closed to global trade and oil prices hovering at $100 per barrel, airlines are facing an increasingly difficult situation, given their reliance on jet fuel. Delta Air Lines, Air Canada, KLM, and Lufthansa have all canceled dozens of less-popular routes ...
